title: Agent Upward Review
lede: Review your prompting behaviour and delegation effectiveness based on direct feedback from your AI coding agents.

highlights.label: Prompt Clarity Score
highlights.detail: Based on context provided in your initial instructions

highlights.label: Zero-Touch PRs
highlights.detail: Tasks completed by AI without human code edits

highlights.label: Iteration Overhead
highlights.detail: Average prompts required to resolve a single issue

sections.title: Delegation Efficiency
sections.description: Percentage of AI-generated Pull Requests requiring zero human intervention over time.

sections.title: Recent Task Feedback
sections.description: Upward reviews from your agents on recently assigned tickets.
rows: Missing documentation on the legacy Stripe implementation.
Clear acceptance criteria and exact file paths provided.
Vague initial prompt; required 5 iterations to clarify Redis structure.

sections.title: Suggested Management Behaviours
sections.description: Actionable areas to optimise your AI delegation skills based on recent loops.
items: Include specific file paths rather than asking the agent to search the entire repository.
Define explicit acceptance criteria in the initial prompt to reduce iteration overhead.
Provide context on upstream dependencies when assigning high-complexity architectural tasks.

demoSteps: Review the highlights to gauge overall delegation effectiveness and prompt clarity.
Observe the 'Delegation Efficiency' trend to see how zero-touch PR rates are improving over time.
Read the 'Recent Task Feedback' table to see specific, constructive critiques from the AI on recent tickets.
Review the actionable 'Suggested Management Behaviours' list to understand how to optimise future prompts.
notes: Demo data is entirely mocked to demonstrate the concept without requiring a live LLM integration.
The term 'Zero-Touch PRs' is used to represent the ideal state of parallelised agentic delivery mentioned in the transcript.
UK spelling is enforced in the user-facing copy (behaviour, optimise).
